# xelon_kubernetes_cluster_versions (Data Source)

The Kubernetes cluster versions data source provides information about available Talos and Kubernetes versions.

## Example Usage

### Default

```terraform
data "xelon_kubernetes_cluster_versions" "hcp" {
  cloud_id = data.xelon_cloud.hcp.id
}

data "xelon_cloud" "hcp" {
  name = "Main HCP Cloud"
}
```

-> Leverage the `latest` attribute for automated version management in Xelon Kubernetes (XKS) clusters.
This attribute resolves to the latest available Talos and Kubernetes versions at deployment time, simplifying
maintenance and ensuring compatibility.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cloud_id` (String) The ID of the cloud.

### Read-Only

- `latest` (Attributes) The latest Talos version and compatible Kubernetes version. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--latest))
- `versions` (Attributes List) The mapping of compatible Talos Linux versions to Kubernetes versions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--versions))

<a id="nestedatt--latest"></a>
### Nested Schema for `latest`

Read-Only:

- `kubernetes_version` (String) The latest Kubernetes version available for the specific Talos version.
- `talos_version` (String) The latest Talos version used to run Kubernetes cluster.


<a id="nestedatt--versions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `versions`

Read-Only:

- `kubernetes_versions` (List of String) The list of Kubernetes versions available for the specific Talos version.
- `talos_version` (String) The Talos version used to run Kubernetes cluster.
